storyboard_steps.name: Raw prompt
storyboard_steps.short_payload: Which files are available for download in batch 69de8a0e0cc6102b5d11f01e?
storyboard_steps.what_changed: Original test prompt enters the packaged SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY path.

storyboard_steps.name: Prompt router view
storyboard_steps.short_payload: confidence=0.9; reason=API/platform family keyword(s): batch, file, files.

storyboard_steps.name: Simple-prompt gate
storyboard_steps.short_payload: confidence=0.9; is_simple=False; suggested_action=USE_DATA_PIPELINE; reason=API/platform family keyword(s): batch, file, files.
storyboard_steps.what_changed: Sends the prompt into the evidence pipeline rather than a direct answer.

storyboard_steps.name: Normalized query
storyboard_steps.short_payload: normalized_query=Which files are available for download in batch 69de8a0e0...; matching_text=which file are available for download in batch 69de8a0e0c...
storyboard_steps.what_changed: Creates matching-friendly text while preserving original wording.

storyboard_steps.name: Tokens/entities/domains
storyboard_steps.what_changed: Extracts batch/file intent and the batch id.

storyboard_steps.name: Query analysis
storyboard_steps.what_changed: Classifies the route as API_ONLY and answer family as batch.

storyboard_steps.name: Lookup path / route intent
storyboard_steps.what_changed: Narrows to batch API families and required id grounding.

storyboard_steps.name: Context card
storyboard_steps.what_changed: Packs the endpoint catalog/context into metadata and prompt budget.

storyboard_steps.name: Selected plan
storyboard_steps.what_changed: Selects a one-call API plan before execution.

storyboard_steps.name: Evidence objects
storyboard_steps.what_changed: Executes the catalog-valid API call in dry-run mode because credentials are unavailable.

storyboard_steps.name: Answer slots / intent
storyboard_steps.what_changed: Maps dry-run evidence into a LIST answer intent with missing payload slots.

storyboard_steps.name: Verified final answer
storyboard_steps.what_changed: Keeps the honest dry-run answer instead of fabricating file names.
